name: media-upload
summary: Upload files from the browser to a PRIVATE Supabase Storage bucket with per-user folders + signed-URL reads. Key-free.
postInstall: Apply supabase/0010_media.sql (creates the private 'user-media' bucket + per-user folder RLS)
No keys. The browser uploads directly to Storage under the user's own folder (RLS-enforced); reads use short-lived signed URLs via a Server Action.
Replace src/features/media/ui/upload-form.tsx after the Claude Design pass
